inputs.srepr: Add(Mul(Symbol('a', real=True), Pow(Symbol('c', real=True), Integer(2)), Symbol('rho', real=True)), Mul(Symbol('b', real=True), Symbol('p', real=True)))

output.srepr: Mul(Rational(1, 2), Pow(Symbol('C_k', real=True), Integer(-1)), Add(Mul(Symbol('a', real=True), Pow(Symbol('c', real=True), Integer(2)), Symbol('rho', real=True)), Mul(Symbol('b', real=True), Symbol('p', real=True))))

scope: toy energy penalty model with pressure/stress source
